channel.title: Home on Yida Weng
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Yida Weng

item.title: Building a Production-Grade AI Agent PoC — From Blueprint to Working System
item.description: A walkthrough of building an observable, testable AI agent with RAG, web search, and code execution — including every twist, turn, and debugging session along the way.

item.title: Deploying The Hive: Taking a Multi-Agent Engineering System to Production on GKE
item.description: A complete walkthrough of containerizing, provisioning cloud infrastructure on GCloud, and deploying a multi-agent AI engineering platform to GKE Autopilot using Terraform, Docker, and Cloud Build

item.title: About
item.description:
I’m a reinforcement learning engineer focused on exploration, AI safety, and robotics.

This blog documents my exploration of RL exploration — the mathematics and engineering behind curiosity-driven agents.

All code is available at github.com/YidaWeng/rl-exploration-poc.

item.title: Exploration in Reinforcement Learning
item.description: A practical guide to entropy-regularized PPO and RND — from the mathematical foundations of uncertainty-directed exploration to experimental results on Ant-v4

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description: My first blog post using Hugo and PaperMod theme
